name: Guaranteed Installment Agreements

eligibility.description: Individual taxpayers with liability under $10,000 (excluding interest/penalties) who have filed and paid on time for the last 5 years and are unable to pay immediately.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS is required to enter into an installment agreement for individuals with liabilities under $10,000, allowing for the deferral of the full tax payment over a 3-year period.
